Uses of Record Class
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.repr.types.BitString

Packages that use BitString
Package
Description
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.algorithms
Top-level algorithm drivers and reusable base classes.
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.algorithms.discrete
Discrete and binary EDA drivers.
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.algorithms.plugins.discrete
 
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.models.discrete
Probabilistic models for discrete/binary search spaces.
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.models.discrete.plugins
 
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.problems
Problem implementations and shared problem-level helpers.
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.problems.crypto
Boolean-function and cryptography optimization problems.
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.problems.discrete
Discrete benchmark problems.
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.problems.discrete.disjunct
 
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.problems.grammar
Grammar-based symbolic regression/classification problems.
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.problems.plugins.discrete
 
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.problems.plugins.grammar
 
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.problems.plugins.mo
 
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.repr.distance
Distance metrics between genotypes.
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.repr.grammar
Grammar-based representation infrastructure.
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.repr.grammar.encoding
Deterministic grammar decision-vector encoding utilities.
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.repr.impl
Representation implementations and validators.
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.repr.plugins.discrete
 
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.repr.plugins.structured
 

  • Uses of BitString in com.knezevic.edaf.v3.algorithms

    Subclasses with type arguments of type BitString in com.knezevic.edaf.v3.algorithms
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    final class 
    HBoaAlgorithm
    Dedicated hierarchical BOA (hBOA) driver for binary dependency-heavy search.
    final class 
    UmdaAlgorithm
    Dedicated UMDA discrete driver.

  • Uses of BitString in com.knezevic.edaf.v3.algorithms.discrete

    Subclasses with type arguments of type BitString in com.knezevic.edaf.v3.algorithms.discrete
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    final class 
    BmdaAlgorithm
    Dedicated BMDA driver that typically pairs with tree-based bivariate dependency models.
    final class 
    BoaAlgorithm
    Dedicated BOA driver for Bayesian-network-based discrete EDAs.
    final class 
    CgaAlgorithm
    Dedicated compact-GA style driver with ratio-based elite selection.
    final class 
    ChowLiuEdaAlgorithm
    Dedicated Chow-Liu dependency-tree EDA driver for binary/categorical search.
    final class 
    DependencyTreeEdaAlgorithm
    Dedicated dependency-tree EDA driver (alias for tree-structured discrete modeling).
    final class 
    EbnaAlgorithm
    Dedicated EBNA driver for Bayesian-network estimation of categorical distributions.
    final class 
    FactorizedDiscreteEdaAlgorithm
    Dedicated factorized-discrete EDA driver for independent-locus probability models.
    final class 
    MimicAlgorithm
    Dedicated MIMIC driver for dependency-aware binary modeling.
    final class 
    PbilAlgorithm
    Dedicated PBIL driver for probability-vector style discrete optimization.

  • Uses of BitString in com.knezevic.edaf.v3.algorithms.plugins.discrete

    Classes in com.knezevic.edaf.v3.algorithms.plugins.discrete that implement interfaces with type arguments of type BitString
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    final class 
    BmdaAlgorithmPlugin
    Plugin for BMDA driver
    final class 
    BoaAlgorithmPlugin
    Plugin for Bayesian Optimization Algorithm driver
    final class 
    CgaAlgorithmPlugin
    Plugin for Compact Genetic Algorithm driver
    final class 
    ChowLiuEdaAlgorithmPlugin
    Plugin for Chow-Liu tree EDA driver
    final class 
    DependencyTreeEdaAlgorithmPlugin
    Plugin for Dependency-tree EDA driver
    final class 
    EbnaAlgorithmPlugin
    Plugin for EBNA driver
    final class 
    FactorizedDiscreteEdaAlgorithmPlugin
    Plugin for Factorized-discrete EDA driver
    final class 
    HBoaAlgorithmPlugin
    Plugin for hierarchical BOA algorithm.
    final class 
    MimicAlgorithmPlugin
    Plugin for MIMIC driver
    final class 
    PbilAlgorithmPlugin
    Plugin for Population-Based Incremental Learning driver
    final class 
    UmdaAlgorithmPlugin
    Plugin for UMDA algorithm.
    final class 
    UmdadAlgorithmPlugin
    Literature alias for binary UMDA (UMDAd).

  • Uses of BitString in com.knezevic.edaf.v3.models.discrete

    Classes in com.knezevic.edaf.v3.models.discrete that implement interfaces with type arguments of type BitString
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    final class 
    BernoulliUmdaModel
    Univariate Marginal Distribution Algorithm (UMDA) model for bitstrings.
    final class 
    BmdaModel
    Bivariate Marginal Distribution Algorithm (BMDA) model.
    final class 
    BoaEbnaModel
    Sparse Bayesian-network model used by BOA/EBNA-style discrete EDAs.
    final class 
    CompactGaModel
    Compact Genetic Algorithm (cGA)-style probability-vector model.
    final class 
    HierarchicalBoaModel
    Hierarchical BOA-style sparse Bayesian-network model for bitstrings.
    final class 
    MimicChowLiuModel
    MIMIC-style model using a Chow-Liu maximum-weight dependency tree.
    final class 
    PbilFrequencyModel
    Population-Based Incremental Learning (PBIL) probability-vector model.
    Methods in com.knezevic.edaf.v3.models.discrete that return types with arguments of type BitString

    Method
    Description

    Class
    Description

    BooleanFunctionMultiObjectiveProblem
    Multi-objective boolean-function problem emitting one objective per selected criterion.

    BooleanFunctionProblem
    Boolean-function optimization over direct truth-table bitstring encoding.

    KnapsackProblem
    0/1 knapsack benchmark with linear overweight penalty.

    MaxSatProblem
    MAX-SAT benchmark over fixed CNF formula.

  • Uses of BitString in com.knezevic.edaf.v3.problems.discrete.disjunct

    Methods in com.knezevic.edaf.v3.problems.discrete.disjunct with parameters of type BitString
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Fitness
    AlmostDisjunctMatrixProblem.evaluate(BitString genotype)
     
    Fitness
    DisjunctMatrixProblem.evaluate(BitString genotype)
     
    Fitness
    ResolvableMatrixProblem.evaluate(BitString genotype)
     
    static DisjunctMatrix
    DisjunctMatrix.fromBitString(BitString genotype, int rows, int columns)
    Builds matrix from a bitstring encoded in column-major layout: bits [j * M, j * M + 1, ..., j * M + (M-1)] correspond to column j.
    static DisjunctMatrixValidationResult
    DisjunctMatrixValidator.validateAlmostDisjunct(BitString genotype, int m, int n, int t, double epsilon, DisjunctMatrixValidationOptions options)
    Bitstring convenience overload for (t,epsilon)-disjunct validation.
    static DisjunctMatrixValidationResult
    DisjunctMatrixValidator.validateDisjunct(BitString genotype, int m, int n, int t, DisjunctMatrixValidationOptions options)
    Bitstring convenience overload for t-disjunct validation.
    static DisjunctMatrixValidationResult
    DisjunctMatrixValidator.validateResolvable(BitString genotype, int m, int n, int t, int f, DisjunctMatrixValidationOptions options)
    Bitstring convenience overload for (t,f)-resolvable validation.

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    final class 
    AlmostDisjunctMatrixProblemPlugin
    Plugin factory for exact (t,epsilon)-disjunct matrix optimization objective.
    final class 
    BooleanFunctionProblemPlugin
    Plugin for direct truth-table boolean-function optimization.
    final class 
    DisjunctMatrixProblemPlugin
    Plugin factory for exact t-disjunct matrix optimization objective.
    final class 
    KnapsackProblemPlugin
    Plugin factory for 0/1 knapsack.
    final class 
    MaxSatProblemPlugin
    Plugin factory for MAX-SAT benchmark instances.
    final class 
    OneMaxProblemPlugin
    Plugin factory for OneMax problem.
    final class 
    ResolvableMatrixProblemPlugin
    Plugin factory for exact (t,f)-resolvable matrix optimization objective.

    Class
    Description

    Plugin for CSV-based symbolic classification (binary and multiclass).
    final class 
    GrammarCsvRegressionProblemPlugin

    final class 
    GrammarMajorityProblemPlugin
    Plugin for majority boolean symbolic classification problem.

    Plugin for Nguyen symbolic regression benchmarks using grammar representation.

    GrammarXorProblemPlugin
    Plugin for XOR boolean symbolic classification problem.

    Modifier and Type
